tagline: Your AI tax advisor for Nigeria, 2026.
aboutBody: Mai Filer is an AI-native Nigerian tax e-filing platform. She profiles you, reads your documents, computes your tax, explains every naira, and prepares filing packs that are NRS-ready. Peer to TurboTax and TaxSlayer — born in the age of AI.

chat.title: Chat with Mai Filer
chat.subtitle: Your filing, through conversation.
chat.placeholder: Ask Mai anything — your payslip, your PIT, reliefs, next steps…
chat.emptyHint: Try: "I earn ₦5,000,000 a year. What is my PIT for 2026?"

identity.title: Verify your identity
identity.subtitle: We check your NIN with a licensed aggregator before preparing any filing.
identity.ninHelper: 11 digits. We never store your raw NIN — only an encrypted copy keyed by a hash.
identity.nameLabel: Full name (as you'd like it on the return)
identity.nameHelper: We compare this against the NIN record and flag any mismatch for you to review.
identity.consentBody: I consent to Mai Filer querying the NIMC record for this NIN to support my tax filing. I understand my NIN will be encrypted at rest and that an audit record of this consent will be stored.
identity.resultNotVerified: We could not verify this NIN
identity.nameMatchStrict: The name matches the NIN record exactly.
identity.nameMatchFuzzy: The name is a close match to the NIN record.
identity.nameMatchMismatch: The name does not match the NIN record. Double-check before filing.

ngo.title: NGO annual return
ngo.subtitle: Record your exempt body's income, expenditure, and WHT remitted. Placeholder statutory rules apply; confirm before filing.
ngo.placeholderBanner: This form uses illustrative 2026 NRS rules pending owner confirmation. Do not file the pack until `ngo_rules.py` is replaced with confirmed values.
ngo.exemptionDeclaration: Trustees affirm the organisation continues to meet the tax-exempt criteria for this year.
ngo.signatoryDeclaration: Authorised signatory affirms this return is true and complete.

sme.title: SME calculators (preview)
sme.subtitle: Live CIT, WHT, and UBL 3.0 envelope validation against the placeholder statutory tables.
sme.placeholderBanner: Illustrative 2026 rules — the owner must supply confirmed NRS CIT bands, WHT rates, and the 55-field UBL list before this surface is used for real filings.
sme.ublHelp: Paste a full envelope JSON to validate against the 8-section / 55-field invariant.

dashboard.title: Your Mai Filer dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Year-over-year tax history, anomalies, and mid-year nudges.
dashboard.factsEmpty: No facts yet. Once you submit (or simulate) a filing, Mai stores the headline numbers here so next year's return starts with context.
dashboard.nudgesEmpty: Nothing to flag for the current pace. Check back after your next paycheque or invoice.
